message:
fix(vdbe): two-pass DELETE to prevent self-referencing subquery corruption + 25 probe tests

DELETE with correlated EXISTS/subquery referencing the same table produced
wrong results because the one-pass scan-and-delete approach allowed WHERE
evaluation to see partially-deleted state. Changed VDBE codegen to match
C SQLite's two-pass approach: Pass 1 collects matching rowids via RowSet,
Pass 2 iterates collected rowids and deletes.

Added 25 new conformance oracle probe tests covering: UPDATE complex SET,
multi-index queries, nested aggregate subqueries, complex JOIN conditions,
GROUP_CONCAT advanced, compound SELECT with ORDER/LIMIT, COALESCE/IFNULL
chains, DELETE with subquery WHERE, ALTER TABLE ADD COLUMN, expression
positions in ORDER/GROUP BY, INSERT OR modes, recursive CTE depth,
derived tables, type coercion comparisons, window ROW_NUMBER/RANK,
window aggregate frames, PRAGMA table_info, hex/blob ops, FK CASCADE,
CAST all types, trigger audit log, string functions extended, numeric math,
savepoint nesting, and lateral aliases.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
